name: Daily Milk Subscription
description: Fresh A2 desi milk delivered every morning to homes in Delhi NCR. Glass bottles, cold-chain maintained, pause or skip from your dashboard anytime.

name: Ghee Subscription Box
tagline: A jar of bilona ghee, every month.
description: Receive 500g of freshly hand-churned ghee on the first week of every month, packed in our signature jar with a curated mithai pairing.

name: Bulk & Wholesale
description: Reliable bulk supply of A2 milk, ghee, paneer and khoya — with traceability, lab reports, and dedicated dispatch.

name: Visit the Gaushala
tagline: Meet the cows. Light a diya. Stay for prasad.
description: Family-friendly visits every Saturday and Sunday. Tour the sheds, witness the bilona process, and feed our cows by hand.

name: Cow Adoption Program
tagline: Sponsor a cow. Receive her milk and her story.
description: Adopt one of our 35+ cows for ₹4,999/month. Receive her milk and ghee, monthly photos, naming rights, and full transparency on her welfare.

name: Custom Pooja Items
tagline: Festival hampers, panchamrut kits, havan samagri.
description: Customised hampers for Diwali, Janmashtami, weddings, and grihapravesh — assembled with panchgavya, ghee diyas, and our seasonal sweets.
